scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.start: concurrently -n "WEB,API" -c "cyan.bold,magenta.bold" --kill-others "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "node -e \"const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const map=process.env.npm_config_map || ''; const bookings=process.env.npm_config_bookings || ''; spawn('npm', ['start', '--prefix', 'backend', '--', '--map='+map, '--bookings='+bookings], {stdio: 'inherit', shell: true})\""
scripts.test: npm test --prefix backend && npm test --prefix frontend
